endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/functions
endpoints.description: Lists all of the functions under the specified streaming job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/functions/{functionName}
endpoints.description: Gets details about the specified function.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FUNCTIONNAME}} with a real functionname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/functions/{functionName}
endpoints.description: Creates a function or replaces an already existing function under an existing streaming job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FUNCTIONNAME}} with a real functionname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/functions/{functionName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a function from the streaming job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FUNCTIONNAME}} with a real functionname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/functions/{functionName}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing function under an existing streaming job. This can be used to partially update (ie. update one or two properties) a function without affecting the rest the job or function definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FUNCTIONNAME}} with a real functionname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/functions/{functionName}/RetrieveDefaultDefinition
endpoints.description: Retrieves the default definition of a function based on the parameters specified.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FUNCTIONNAME}} with a real functionname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/functions/{functionName}/test
endpoints.description: Tests if the information provided for a function is valid. This can range from testing the connection to the underlying web service behind the function or making sure the function code provided is syntactically correct.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FUNCTIONNAME}} with a real functionname.
